methods.name: ShipmentConfirmValidator
calls: RuleFor(x => x.Customer).Must(x => x?.IsTBD != true && x?.IsBlackList != true)
RuleFor(x => x).Must(x => { decimal? calculated = x.FreightRate * x.CargoQuantity; return Math.Abs(calculated.Value - x.FreightTotal) < 0.2m; })

RuleFor(x => x).Must(x => { if (x.CargoOptionInPercents == null || x.MinQuantity == null) return true; var expectedMin = x.CargoQuantity * (1 - x.CargoOptionInPercents / 100); return Math.Round(x.MinQuantity.Value, 3) == Math.Round(expectedMin.Value, 3); })

RuleFor(x => x).Must(x => { if (x.CargoOptionInPercents == null || x.MaxQuantity == null) return true; var expectedMax = x.CargoQuantity * (1 + x.CargoOptionInPercents / 100); return Math.Round(x.MaxQuantity.Value, 3) == Math.Round(expectedMax.Value, 3); })

methods.name: SetupApprovalValidations
calls: RuleFor(x => x.Lattitude).NotNull().WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("Latitude is required for approval").Must(lat => lat.HasValue && lat.Value != 0 && lat.Value >= -90 && lat.Value <= 90).WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("Latitude must be a valid coordinate (not 0) and between -90 and 90 degrees")

RuleFor(x => x.Longtitude).NotNull().WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("Longitude is required for approval").Must(lon => lon.HasValue && lon.Value != 0 && lon.Value >= -180 && lon.Value <= 180).WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("Longitude must be a valid coordinate (not 0) and between -180 and 180 degrees")
RuleFor(x => x.TimeZone).NotNull().NotEmpty().WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("Time zone is required for approval")

RuleFor(x => x.BunkerConsumptions).Must(HaveValidBunkerConsumptions).WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("Valid bunker consumption data is required for approval").When(x => RequiresBunkerData(x.ReportType))
RuleFor(x => x.TimeOfReport).Must(BeReasonableReportTime).WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("Report time should not be too far in the future")

methods.name: SetupReportTypeSpecificValidations
calls: When(x => x.ReportType == VesselReportTypeEnum.Departure.ToString(), () => { RuleFor(x => x.TimeOfDeparture).NotNull().WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("Time of departure is mandatory for departure reports"); RuleFor(x => x.VoyageIteneraryItemId).NotNull().WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("Voyage itinerary item is mandatory for departure reports"); RuleFor(x => new { x.TimeOfDeparture, x.TimeOfArrival }).Must(times => { var (etd, eta) = (times.TimeOfDeparture, times.TimeOfArrival); if (etd == null) return false; if (eta == null) return true; return etd < eta; }).WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("TimeOfDeparture must be before TimeOfArrival when arrival time is specified"); })

When(x => x.ReportType == VesselReportTypeEnum.Noon.ToString(), () => { RuleFor(x => x.DistanceTravelledInSeaMiles).GreaterThanOrEqualTo(0).WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("Distance travelled should be specified for noon reports"); RuleFor(x => x.SpeedTravelledInKnots).GreaterThanOrEqualTo(0).LessThanOrEqualTo(30).When(x => x.SpeedTravelledInKnots.HasValue).WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("Speed travelled should be realistic for noon reports"); RuleFor(x => new { x.TimeOfReport, x.TimeOfArrival }).Must(times => { var (tor, eta) = (times.TimeOfReport, times.TimeOfArrival); if (tor == default) return false; if (eta == null) return true; return tor < eta; }).WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("TimeOfReport must be before TimeOfArrival when arrival time is specified."); })

When(x => x.ReportType == VesselReportTypeEnum.Arrival.ToString(), () => { RuleFor(x => x.TimeOfArrival).NotNull().WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("Time of arrival is mandatory for arrival reports"); RuleFor(x => x.DestinationId).NotNull().WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("Destination is mandatory for arrival reports"); })

When(x => x.ReportType == VesselReportTypeEnum.Berth.ToString(), () => { RuleFor(x => new { x.TimeOfBerth, x.TimeOfUnBerth, x.TimeOfDeparture }).Must(times => { var (etb, etu, etd) = (times.TimeOfBerth, times.TimeOfUnBerth, times.TimeOfDeparture); if (etb == null && etu == null && etd == null) return true; if (etb != null && etu != null && etb >= etu) return false; if (etu != null && etd != null && etu >= etd) return false; if (etb != null && etd != null && etb >= etd) return false; return true; }).WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("Time of Berth should be before Time of Unberth, and Time of Unberth should be before Time of Departure"); })

When(x => x.ReportType == VesselReportTypeEnum.InPort.ToString(), () => { RuleFor(x => new { x.TimeOfBerth, x.TimeOfUnBerth, x.TimeOfDeparture }).Must(times => { var (etb, etu, etd) = (times.TimeOfBerth, times.TimeOfUnBerth, times.TimeOfDeparture); if (etb == null && etu == null && etd == null) return true; if (etb != null && etu != null && etb >= etu) return false; if (etu != null && etd != null && etu >= etd) return false; if (etb != null && etd != null && etb >= etd) return false; return true; }).WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("Time of Berth should be before Time of Unberth, and Time of Unberth should be before Time of Departure"); })

When(x => x.ReportType == VesselReportTypeEnum.UnBerth.ToString(), () => { RuleFor(x => new { x.TimeOfBerth, x.TimeOfUnBerth, x.TimeOfDeparture }).Must(times => { var (etb, etu, etd) = (times.TimeOfBerth, times.TimeOfUnBerth, times.TimeOfDeparture); if (etb == null && etu == null && etd == null) return true; if (etb != null && etu != null && etb >= etu) return false; if (etu != null && etd != null && etu >= etd) return false; if (etb != null && etd != null && etb >= etd) return false; return true; }).WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("Time of Berth should be before Time of Unberth, and Time of Unberth should be before Time of Departure."); })

methods.name: BunkerConsumptionApprovalValidator
calls: RuleFor(x => x.RemainingAmountInMetricTons).NotNull().GreaterThanOrEqualTo(0).WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("Remaining amount must be specified and cannot be negative")

RuleFor(x => x.TotalConsumptionInMetricTons).GreaterThanOrEqualTo(0).When(x => x.TotalConsumptionInMetricTons.HasValue && x.IsSounding != true && x.IsNewReceival != true).WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("Total consumption cannot be negative")

RuleFor(x => x).Must(HaveConsistentConsumptionMath).WithSeverity(Severity.Error).WithMessage("ROB calculation inconsistent: TotalConsumption should be correct.").WithName("ConsumptionMath").When(x => x.IsNewReceival != true)

methods.name: AttachTargetInvoiceToPlItems
calls: context.InvoiceItems.AsNoTracking().Where(i => !i.IsDeleted).Where(x => x.TargetInvoiceEntityId.HasValue && x.TimeCharterId == timeCharterId && x.PLItemType == nameof(ProfitAndLossIdentifierEnum.TCOOffHireCVE)).Where(item => item.PeriodFrom <= plItem.EndDate && plItem.StartDate < item.PeriodTo).Select(item => item.Invoice!).Where(inv => inv != null).GroupBy(inv => inv.Id).Select(g => g.First()).Select(inv => new TargetInvoiceDto { TargetInvoiceId = inv.Id, TargetInvoiceNo = inv.InvoiceNo, TargetInvoiceType = inv.InvoiceType, TargetVoyageId = inv.VoyageId, TargetInvoiceStatus = inv.Status }).ToList()

calls: invoiceItems.Where(x => x.TargetInvoiceEntityId == commission.Id).Select(inv => new TargetInvoiceDto { TargetInvoiceId = inv.Invoice!.Id, TargetInvoiceNo = inv.Invoice!.InvoiceNo, TargetInvoiceType = inv.Invoice.InvoiceType, TargetVoyageId = inv.Invoice.VoyageId, TargetInvoiceStatus = inv.Invoice.Status }).ToList()

methods.name: AttachTargetInvoiceToRates
calls: invoiceItems.Where(item => item.PeriodFrom <= rate.EndDate && rate.StartDate < item.PeriodTo).Select(item => item.Invoice!).Where(inv => inv != null).GroupBy(inv => inv.Id).Select(g => g.First()).Select(inv => new TargetInvoiceDto { TargetInvoiceId = inv.Id, TargetInvoiceNo = inv.InvoiceNo, TargetInvoiceType = inv.InvoiceType, TargetVoyageId = inv.VoyageId, TargetInvoiceStatus = inv.Status }).ToList()
